objects.query: SELECT Id, Name, ProductCode, Description, IsActive, Family FROM Product2 WHERE ProductCode IN ('EDGE_5G_ROUTER','UNLIMITED_5G_DATA','FIBER_INSTALL','TELCO_PLATINUM_SLA')
SELECT Id, Name, IsActive FROM Pricebook2 WHERE IsStandard = true

SELECT Id, Product2Id, Pricebook2Id, UnitPrice, IsActive, CurrencyIsoCode FROM PricebookEntry WHERE Product2.ProductCode IN ('EDGE_5G_ROUTER','UNLIMITED_5G_DATA','FIBER_INSTALL','TELCO_PLATINUM_SLA') AND Pricebook2.IsStandard = true
